name: Peaches with a Sunshine Smile
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz) of peach halves, halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange lettuce leaves in a bowl or plate.
2. Spoon a layer of cottage cheese onto the lettuce.
3. Place a peach half on top of the cottage cheese with the round end up.
4. Gently press raisins into the peach to form a sunshine face.
5. Sprinkle extra raisins over the cottage cheese.
